questions.original_question: Where are Zeekr 001 and Zeekr 009 manufactured?
questions.answer: The Zeekr 001 and Zeekr 009 are both manufactured at the Zeekr Factory, located in the Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone. This facility is owned by Geely Holding and operates under the cooperation framework agreements between Lotus Technology and Geely Group. The factory ensures high-quality production and delivery of these vehicles. This information is accurate as of knowledge available before December 31, 2024.

rag_info.chunk_content: Lotus Technology has in the past entered into a series of cooperation framework agreements in relation to battery electric vehicle (BEV) development and manufacturing with Geely Group. The cooperation framework agreements relate to either the manufacturing of the Zeekr 001, Zeekr 001 FR, and Zeekr 009 at the Zeekr Factory (the “Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements”), the manufacturing of the Zeekr X at the Chengdu Factory (the “Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model and Zeekr 7X at the Meishan Factory (the “Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), as well as the manufacturing of the Zeekr Mix and vehicles for Waymo at the Chunxiao Factory (the “Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement,” and together with the Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements and the Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement, the “Cooperation Framework Agreements”). The currently effective Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in August 2022. The currently effective Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in February 2023. The currently effective Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in January 2024. The currently effective Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in May 2024. Lotus Technology purchases vehicles from Geely Group at a price made up of the purchase cost of direct materials and a preagreed markup. Lotus Technology provides a standard product warranty to the vehicle purchasers. Under the Cooperation Framework Agreements, in the event where product quality issues are due to product manufacturing, Lotus Technology is entitled to seek damages from the factories, as applicable.

As a premium BEV brand incubated by Geely Group, Lotus Technology inherits unique competitive edges from Geely Group that are developed through years of execution experience at the frontier of the industry, such as innovative and agile engineering capabilities, robust R&D capabilities, deep industry expertise, extreme attention to safety, top-notch professionals, strong supply chain and manufacturing management capabilities, and operational know-how. Geely Group’s powerful and world-class brand equity also echoes product innovation, performance, and reliability in its broad customer base, which, in turn, contributes to the significant consumer interest and demand for the ZEEKR brand. These competitive advantages enable Lotus Technology to quickly incorporate customer needs and concepts into its products and manage the complex operation process to achieve the fast ramp-up of production and deliveries. Lotus Technology also leverages Geely Group’s advanced and well-established manufacturing capacity, which helps retain effective oversight over key steps in procurement, manufacturing, and product quality control with minimal capital outlay. At the same time, Lotus Technology's BEVs are manufactured at the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone owned by Geely Holding (the “ZEEKR Factory”), the manufacturing plant in Chengdu owned by Geely Auto (the “Chengdu Factory”), or the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Beilun District owned by Geely Holding (the “Meishan Factory”), and Geely Holding was Lotus Technology's largest supplier for 2022 and 2023. Furthermore, before the launch of ZEEKR 001, a significant portion of Lotus Technology's revenue has historically been derived from the sales of batteries and other components and research and development services to Geely Group.

Lotus Technology has entered into Cooperation Framework Agreements with Geely Group for the manufacturing of the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR 009 at the ZEEKR Factory, the manufacturing of the ZEEKR X at the Chengdu Factory, and the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model at the Meishan Factory. Lotus Technology's future operation and prospects depend on the successful ramping and maintaining of operations in the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. See “Business — Manufacturing and Quality Control.” There can be no assurance that Lotus Technology's oversight on battery electric vehicle (BEV) manufacturing will always be effective, as the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory are not owned by Lotus Technology. Vehicle production at such factories may also experience delays or suspensions. For example, vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory was temporarily suspended in early 2022 due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and Lotus Technology also encountered a temporary suspension in production at the ZEEKR Factory in the first quarter of 2023 due to production line upgrades at the factory. As of the date of this prospectus, Lotus Technology has not experienced any material customer complaints caused by the delays or suspensions of vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. In addition, there will be a negative impact on Lotus Technology's business operation if, in the future, such original equipment manufacturer (OEM) model is limited by applicable laws and regulations, or becomes subject to more stringent regulatory oversight.

Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

Lotus Technology's results of operations and financial conditions substantially depend on the sales of its battery electric vehicles (BEVs). Therefore, the delivery volume of the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model, which are Lotus Technology's mass-produced BEV models, is a key indicator used to monitor the company's business operations and performance. ZEEKR vehicles are well received by the market driven by their superior performance, stylish design, and functionality that meets diversified customer needs and provides an outstanding mobility experience. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of the ZEEKR 001 to the market, making the ZEEKR 001 the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China. This is among the fastest deliveries in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan. The following chart summarizes the monthly deliveries of ZEEKR vehicles for the periods indicated.

Lotus Technology has in the past entered into a series of cooperation framework agreements in relation to battery electric vehicle (BEV) development and manufacturing with Geely Group. The cooperation framework agreements relate to either the manufacturing of the Zeekr 001, Zeekr 001 FR, and Zeekr 009 at the Zeekr Factory (the “Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements”), the manufacturing of the Zeekr X at the Chengdu Factory (the “Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model and Zeekr 7X at the Meishan Factory (the “Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), as well as the manufacturing of the Zeekr Mix and vehicles for Waymo at the Chunxiao Factory (the “Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement,” and together with the Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements and the Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement, the “Cooperation Framework Agreements”). The currently effective Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in August 2022. The currently effective Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in February 2023. The currently effective Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in January 2024. The currently effective Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in May 2024. Lotus Technology purchases vehicles from Geely Group at a price made up of the purchase cost of direct materials and a preagreed markup. Lotus Technology provides a standard product warranty to the vehicle purchasers. Under the Cooperation Framework Agreements, in the event where product quality issues are due to product manufacturing, Lotus Technology is entitled to seek damages from the factories, as applicable.

At the same time, Lotus Technology's BEVs are manufactured at the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone owned by Geely Holding (the “ZEEKR Factory”), the manufacturing plant in Chengdu owned by Geely Auto (the “Chengdu Factory”), or the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Beilun District owned by Geely Holding (the “Meishan Factory”), and Geely Holding was Lotus Technology's largest supplier for 2022 and 2023. Furthermore, before the launch of ZEEKR 001, a significant portion of Lotus Technology's revenue has historically been derived from the sales of batteries and other components and research and development services to Geely Group.

According to the Frost & Sullivan Report, major players in the China premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) market include pureplay BEV companies and traditional original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) that also produce BEVs. The competition among premium BEV manufacturers concentrates on key factors such as product features, price, product quality and reliability, as well as design, brand awareness, and user experience. Leveraging the recognized product quality and in-depth focus on technology upgrading and efficient supply chain management, the ZEEKR 001 has become the best-selling premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) model in China in terms of sales volume, with 75,928 units delivered in 2023. During the same period, the ZEEKR 009 was also among the top ten premium BEV models in China with a sales volume of 19,527 units. Among the top 10 best-selling premium BEV models, the ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 have been widely recognized by customers in a very short time, which demonstrates their superior brand power and product performance.

Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021. In February 2024, Lotus Technology released an upgraded model of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model). Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in March 2024. In October 2023, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 FR, its cross-over hatchback vehicle model based on ZEEKR 001. Featuring unique exterior and interior design and proprietary technologies, ZEEKR 001 FR is designed to offer outstanding vehicle performance with various driving modes. Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. • ZEEKR 009. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second model, ZEEKR 009, a luxury six-seater MPV model providing a comfortable, ultra-luxury mobility experience for both families and business uses. ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first premium MPV based on a pure-electric platform, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 009 has enjoyed wide popularity since launch, and Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 009 to its customers in January 2023. In April 2024, Lotus Technology launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. Lotus Technology also released ZEEKR MIX, its MPV model, in the same month. • ZEEKR X.

Lotus Technology's future operation and prospects depend on the successful ramping and maintaining of operations in the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. See “Business — Manufacturing and Quality Control.” There can be no assurance that Lotus Technology's oversight on battery electric vehicle (BEV) manufacturing will always be effective, as the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory are not owned by Lotus Technology. Vehicle production at such factories may also experience delays or suspensions. For example, vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory was temporarily suspended in early 2022 due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and Lotus Technology also encountered a temporary suspension in production at the ZEEKR Factory in the first quarter of 2023 due to production line upgrades at the factory. As of the date of this prospectus, Lotus Technology has not experienced any material customer complaints caused by the delays or suspensions of vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. In addition, there will be a negative impact on Lotus Technology's business operations if, in the future, such original equipment manufacturer (OEM) model is limited by applicable laws and regulations, or becomes subject to more stringent regulatory oversight.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Zeekr 001, Zeekr's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), is a premium crossover shooting brake developed with proprietary research and development (R&D), deep market insights, and the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA) platform. Launched in April 2021 with deliveries beginning in October 2021, the Zeekr 001 was the first mass-produced BEV with over $1,000 kilometers CLTC range. In October 2023, Zeekr introduced the Zeekr 001 FR, a high-performance variant featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, 800V Qilin battery, and quad e-drive system, achieving 2.02 seconds 0-100 kilometers per hour acceleration and a 280 kilometers per hour top speed. In 2024, Zeekr launched upgraded versions of the Zeekr 001 with Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 and significant performance, safety, and intelligence upgrades.

title: Zeekr 001 
summary: The Zeekr 001, launched in April 2021 as the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) on the SEA platform, is a premium crossover shooting brake known for its remarkable range of over 1,000 km on the CLTC cycle. In October 2023, the high-performance Zeekr 001 FR variant was unveiled, featuring a lightweight carbon fiber body, an 800V Qilin battery, and a quad e-drive system that enables acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, with a top speed of 280 km/h. In 2024, the Zeekr 001 received upgrades, including the Zeekr Intelligent Driving 2.0 system, enhancing its performance, safety, and intelligence.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology's first mass-produced BEV model, ZEEKR 001, is a premium crossover shooting brake BEV model developed based on Lotus Technology's proprietary R&D capabilities, deep market insights, and SEA. ZEEKR 001 is a unique, stylish, and versatile BEV model with a suite of technologies targeting the premium BEV market. Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 on April 15, 2021, and started delivery on October 23, 2021. Since its initial release, ZEEKR 001 has been well received by the market, driven by its superior performance, stylish design, and functionality that meet diversified customer needs and provide an outstanding mobility experience. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. The following diagram illustrates the exterior and interior of the ZEEKR 001. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making ZEEKR 001 the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. In February 2024, Lotus Technology released the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) with major upgrades and started delivery in March 2024. The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is equipped with a robust and comprehensive 800V high-voltage system, the same as the ZEEKR 001 FR. The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is driven by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip and operates on ZEEKR OS 6.0.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is the inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) from ZEEKR, designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and leveraging proprietary research, it combines style, versatility, and advanced technology tailored for the premium BEV market. The model quickly gained traction, achieving a remarkable milestone in October 2022 by delivering over 10,000 units in a single month, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to reach this benchmark.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system and powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, running on ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0-100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, improved energy efficiency, and advanced safety features through the integration of the Mobileye EVO platform. The luxurious interior is equipped with cutting-edge technology, including a 15.05-inch OLED central control screen and a 35.5-inch AR-HUD, providing a premium driving experience.

Key features of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) include a robust 100 kWh battery offering a range of 705 km, a maximum power output of 580 kW, and innovative connectivity options. The vehicle emphasizes comfort with dual-chamber air suspension and customizable ambient settings. Overall, the ZEEKR 001 exemplifies a blend of performance, comfort, and advanced technology, solidifying its position in the electric vehicle market.

In October 2023, ZEEKR launched the ZEEKR 001 FR, a high-performance crossover hatchback derived from the original model. This variant features a powerful 100 kWh battery, achieving a staggering 0-100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, and incorporates advanced technologies for enhanced connectivity and intelligence. With a focus on lightweight design and aerodynamics, the ZEEKR 001 FR aims to deliver exceptional performance and safety, further establishing ZEEKR's commitment to innovation in the electric vehicle sector.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, focusing on premium models and innovative technology solutions. With a strong emphasis on in-house research and development, the company has established a flexible organizational structure that enables rapid product development and market entry. Since its inception, ZEEKR has launched several notable models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, and the ZEEKR 009, a luxury MPV. The company has achieved impressive sales milestones, delivering over 196,000 vehicles by the end of 2023, with significant growth in both the Chinese and European markets.

ZEEKR leverages the SEA platform from Geely Group, which provides a modular architecture for various vehicle types and supports advanced technologies. The company is committed to enhancing its vehicles with cutting-edge features, including autonomous driving capabilities and an intelligent cockpit experience. ZEEKR's robust supply chain and manufacturing capabilities, coupled with strategic partnerships with industry leaders like Mobileye and CATL, further bolster its competitive edge.

The BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, driven by technological advancements and favorable regulations. ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its product lineup and enhancing customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model and a comprehensive charging network. The company's vision is to redefine premium mobility with innovative, high-performance electric vehicles that cater to the evolving needs of consumers.

title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

ZEEKR's growth trajectory has been impressive, with significant milestones such as delivering over 10,000 units of the ZEEKR 001 within four months of its launch and achieving a total of 196,633 vehicle deliveries by the end of 2023. The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving the electrification and innovation of the automotive industry through the development of premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is ZEEKR's inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and developed through proprietary research and market insights, the ZEEKR 001 has received positive feedback for its performance, stylish design, and versatility since deliveries began on October 23, 2021. A notable achievement occurred in October 2022 when ZEEKR delivered 10,119 units in a single month, marking it as the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to surpass this milestone, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system, a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, and ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0 to 100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, advanced safety features through the Mobileye EVO platform, and luxurious interior amenities like a dual-chamber air suspension and a state-of-the-art cockpit with multiple high-definition displays.

The 2024 ZEEKR 001 is powered by a robust 100 kWh battery, offering a CLTC range of 705 km and ultra-fast charging capabilities. It delivers a maximum power output of 580 kW and peak torque of 810 N·m, ensuring exceptional driving performance. The vehicle also incorporates advanced connectivity features, including frameless automatic doors and an augmented reality heads-up display, while its intelligence is enhanced by a high-performance Mobileye EyeQ5H chip for autonomous driving capabilities.

The ZEEKR 001 has generated significant revenue since its launch, with total sales reaching RMB 1,544.3 million in 2021, RMB 19,671.2 million in 2022, and RMB 20,635.4 million in 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 001 FR, a crossover hatchback model that features advanced design and technology, including a maximum power output of 930 kW and acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds. The ZEEKR 001 FR is built on the SEA platform and incorporates lightweight carbon fiber components for improved performance and aerodynamics.

Overall, the ZEEKR 001 and its 2024 model, along with the new ZEEKR 001 FR, exemplify ZEEKR's commitment to delivering a luxurious and technologically advanced electric vehicle experience, emphasizing performance, comfort, and innovative features.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: ZEEKR's products have been well received by the market, achieving a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months since its initial delivery in October 2021, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle (NEV) models and premium BEV models in China. Lotus Technology's current and future models will be primarily based on Geely Holding’s proprietary SEA, which is highly agile, compatible, and enables Lotus Technology to quickly build and launch a wide range of vehicle models catering to different demands in the premium BEV segment. Developed based on SEA, ZEEKR vehicles embody impressive vehicle performance, FOTA-enabled upgrades, superior driving and riding experiences, as well as striking and trendy designs that provide a comprehensive smart mobility experience to Lotus Technology's customers. • Outstanding battery and range performance. The up-to- $100 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery supports a maximum CLTC range of $741 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 and $750 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), respectively, which is ahead of most of the BEV models of Lotus Technology's peers, according to Frost & Sullivan. According to Frost & Sullivan, ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with over $800 \mathrm{km}$ CLTC range, and it has the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024. • State-of-the-art autonomous driving expertise.

metadata.title_summary:
title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

metadata.title_summary:
title: COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE 
summary: The Frost & Sullivan Report provides a comprehensive overview of the premium Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) market in China, highlighting intense competition between dedicated BEV manufacturers and traditional Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs) venturing into this space. Key competitive factors include product features, pricing, quality, design, brand recognition, and user experience. 

In 2023, the ZEEKR 001 emerged as the best-selling premium BEV, with 75,928 units delivered, attributed to its high quality, advanced technology, and efficient supply chain. The ZEEKR 009 also performed well, ranking among the top ten models with 19,527 units sold, showcasing ZEEKR's strong brand presence and product performance. The report details a ranking of the top-selling premium BEV models, with ZEEKR dominating the list, followed by NIO's ET5 and ES6, and BMW's i3 and iX3.

The ZEEKR 001, launched in October 2021, achieved a remarkable milestone by delivering 10,000 units in just four months, making it one of the fastest in the mid- to high-end BEV market. It stands out for its exceptional performance, advanced features like voice recognition, and pilot assist capabilities. The report also includes a comparative analysis of various premium BEV models, emphasizing ZEEKR 001's competitive pricing and specifications, including a 100 kWh battery and a range of 705 km.

In the electric Multi-Purpose Vehicle (MPV) segment, the ZEEKR 009 led sales in 2023 with 19,527 units sold, followed by models from BESTUNE, BYD, Denza, and VOYAH, reflecting a growing consumer preference for technologically advanced and spacious vehicles. 

Additionally, the ZEEKR X, an electric compact SUV launched in April 2023, quickly gained traction, ranking among the top ten best-selling electric SUVs priced between RMB 150,000 and RMB 300,000. It achieved notable sales of 19,622 units, underscoring its competitive position in the market.

Overall, the report illustrates a dynamic and competitive landscape in China's premium BEV and electric MPV markets, with ZEEKR models leading in sales and consumer recognition due to their innovative features and strategic pricing.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology's ZEEKR vehicles offer safe, efficient, and durable battery solutions. • The ZEEKR 001 can be equipped with (i) $100 \mathrm{kW h}$ battery packs developed by CATL or (ii) 86 kWh battery packs developed by CATL or Ningbo Viridi, depending on different vehicle versions. In particular, CATL’s $100 \mathrm{kW h}$ battery packs deliver reliability and safety using Ni55 battery cells, enabling the ZEEKR 001 to have a $741 \mathrm{km}$ maximum CLTC range. With highly efficient battery packs, the ZEEKR 001 can be charged from $10\%$ to $80\%$ within 30 minutes, and it can travel approximately $120 \mathrm{km}$ after only a five-minute charge. The company also launched the ZEEKR 001 equipped with CATL’s Qilin battery, which enables the ZEEKR 001 to have an expected maximum CLTC range of over $1,000 \ \mathrm{km}$, making the ZEEKR 001 the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 \mathrm{km}$ CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) can be equipped with (i) $100 \mathrm{kW h}$ Qilin battery packs or (ii) $95 \mathrm{kW h}$ battery packs, both developed by CATL, depending on different vehicle versions. In particular, CATL’s $100 \mathrm{kW h}$ Qilin battery packs enable a $750 \mathrm{km}$ maximum CLTC range, making the ZEEKR 001 able to travel $210 \mathrm{km}$ with a five-minute charge and $390 \mathrm{km}$ with a 10-minute charge. Meanwhile, the ZEEKR 001 FR is equipped with the $800 \mathrm{V}$ Qilin battery produced by CATL to deliver an outstanding driving range and charging speed.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Battery Solutions 
summary: ZEEKR vehicles are designed with a focus on reliable battery solutions that emphasize safety, efficiency, and durability. The ZEEKR 001 model offers versatile battery options, including 100 kWh and 86 kWh packs from CATL or Ningbo Viridi, with the 100 kWh version featuring Ni55 cells that provide a maximum CLTC range of 741 km. This battery can be charged from 10% to 80% in just 30 minutes, and a quick five-minute charge allows for about 120 km of travel. The 2024 model introduces 100 kWh or 95 kWh Qilin battery packs, with the 100 kWh version achieving a range of 750 km and enabling 210 km of travel with a five-minute charge. The ZEEKR 001 FR enhances performance further with an 800 V Qilin battery for improved range and charging speed.

The ZEEKR 009 offers larger battery options of 140 kWh or 116 kWh Qilin packs, also from CATL, achieving a remarkable maximum CLTC range of 822 km, marking it as the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) utilizing this technology. Meanwhile, the ZEEKR X is equipped with a 66 kWh battery pack, providing a maximum CLTC range of 560 km or 512 km, depending on the version. Additionally, Ningbo Viridi's proprietary battery management system (BMS) enhances the performance, durability, and safety of its battery packs. For further details on Ningbo Viridi's innovations, refer to the relevant section on their technologies.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: This powerful combination ensures exceptional performance, swift charging capabilities, dependable driving range, and superior energy discharge efficiency. The 0-100 km/h acceleration for the four-wheel-drive version of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is 3.3 seconds, shaving off 0.5 seconds compared to the former ZEEKR 001 model. In terms of driving safety and reliability, the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) incorporates the latest Mobileye EVO domain control platform, allowing it to offer bolstered performance and heightened system stability. The sophisticated perception algorithm enhances the detection precision of vehicles, pedestrians, and other objects, and it has the unique capability to identify a wide array of non-standard obstacles, positioning it at the forefront of vehicular safety and performance technology. Supported by dual chamber air suspension, the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) elevates the in-vehicle experience with its advanced cockpit technology, boasting a 15.05-inch 2.5K OLED central control screen, a 13.02-inch high-definition instrument panel, and an expansive 35.5-inch AR-HUD. The YOU model for the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is priced at RMB 329 thousand, and Lotus Technology also offers a range of prices to cater to a wide consumer base. The following diagram illustrates the exterior and interior of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model). The following diagram illustrates the key features of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model).

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is the inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) from ZEEKR, designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and leveraging proprietary research, it combines style, versatility, and advanced technology tailored for the premium BEV market. The model quickly gained traction, achieving a remarkable milestone in October 2022 by delivering over 10,000 units in a single month, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to reach this benchmark.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system and powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, running on ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0-100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, improved energy efficiency, and advanced safety features through the integration of the Mobileye EVO platform. The luxurious interior is equipped with cutting-edge technology, including a 15.05-inch OLED central control screen and a 35.5-inch AR-HUD, providing a premium driving experience.

Key features of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) include a robust 100 kWh battery offering a range of 705 km, a maximum power output of 580 kW, and innovative connectivity options. The vehicle emphasizes comfort with dual-chamber air suspension and customizable ambient settings. Overall, the ZEEKR 001 exemplifies a blend of performance, comfort, and advanced technology, solidifying its position in the electric vehicle market.

In October 2023, ZEEKR launched the ZEEKR 001 FR, a high-performance crossover hatchback derived from the original model. This variant features a powerful 100 kWh battery, achieving a staggering 0-100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, and incorporates advanced technologies for enhanced connectivity and intelligence. With a focus on lightweight design and aerodynamics, the ZEEKR 001 FR aims to deliver exceptional performance and safety, further establishing ZEEKR's commitment to innovation in the electric vehicle sector.

It highlights advancements such as improved battery capacity, acceleration, smart cockpit features, autonomous driving systems, and in-car interactive technologies.  
- **Context**: Before the table, the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is described as an upgraded electric vehicle equipped with cutting-edge powertrain, safety systems, and luxury features. After the table, further emphasis is placed on the model's blend of performance, comfort, and technology, showcasing proprietary systems and spacious design for exceptional drivability and mobility.  
- **Special Notes**: The table uses metrics like kilowatt (kW), kilometers (km), and Newton-meters (N·m) for technical specifications, and includes a superscript marker "(2)" linked to acceleration data, though the related footnote is not visible.  

[Row Level]  
**Row 1**: The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) features a battery capacity of 100kWh, enabling a CLTC range of 705km. The vehicle uses a ternary lithium battery paired with an 800V ultra-fast charging platform for superior energy efficiency and swift charging capabilities.  

**Row 2**: The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) delivers a maximum power output of 580kW. Its acceleration capability from 0 to 100km/h is 3.3 seconds, marked with a superscript "(2)." The peak torque is measured at 810N·m, and the vehicle achieves a maximum speed of 240km/h, reflecting its high-performance profile.  

**Row 3**: Connectivity features include frameless automatic power doors labeled as "Power Door." The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) is equipped with a 35.5-inch AR HUD (Augmented Reality Head-Up Display) along with an intelligent cockpit platform driven by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip. A premium audio system developed by Yamaha enhances the auditory experience.  

**Row 4**: The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) integrates intelligence with a 7nm Mobileye EyeQ5H high-performance chip, enabling advanced computational capabilities. The Mobileye EVO domain control platform supports LiDAR technology for enhanced autonomous features. In-car interaction is enabled via eye control technology, complementing ZEEKR AD autonomous driving capabilities.  

**Row 5**: Comfort features include dual-chamber air suspension for smooth rides. The "Smart Magic Carpet" system actively adjusts the stiffness of air suspension for dynamic road conditions. The "Smart Canopy," which is light-sensitive and controls lighting by area, adds an interactive ambiance, while the "Healing Mode" provides options for ventilation, massage, auto-adjusted light, smell, and temperature, creating a luxury in-car experience.

Lotus Technology has meticulously designed the ZEEKR 001 to provide a comprehensive and luxurious mobility experience featuring ultimate performance, comfort, and technology. Below are some notable features of the ZEEKR 001 prior to the 2024 upgrade, which demonstrate Lotus Technology's commitment to its mission of creating the ultimate experience of mobility life through its technology and solutions since its inception and showcase the performance, comfort, and technology of the ZEEKR 001 models delivered so far. • Performance. Lotus Technology started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. The following diagram illustrates the key features of the ZEEKR 001 FR.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: To improve vehicle performance, the ZEEKR 001 FR utilizes lightweight carbon fiber components to reduce vehicle weight, add downforce, and enhance aerodynamic performance, allowing the vehicle to achieve a maximum speed of 280 km/h. To ensure a satisfactory driving range, the ZEEKR 001 FR uses the 800V Qilin battery produced by CATL. Leveraging the advanced SEA Platform, the ZEEKR 001 FR is powered by torque vectoring technologies to assign and adjust power to each vehicle wheel instantly. Along with the distributed quad e-drive design, the ZEEKR 001 FR enables an acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in 2.02 seconds and a braking distance of 33.4 m from 100 to 0 km/h. The ZEEKR 001 FR also utilizes a unique “dragonfly” structure with an integrated aluminum body at the rear end to increase safety.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is the inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) from ZEEKR, designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and leveraging proprietary research, it combines style, versatility, and advanced technology tailored for the premium BEV market. The model quickly gained traction, achieving a remarkable milestone in October 2022 by delivering over 10,000 units in a single month, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to reach this benchmark.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system and powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, running on ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0-100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, improved energy efficiency, and advanced safety features through the integration of the Mobileye EVO platform. The luxurious interior is equipped with cutting-edge technology, including a 15.05-inch OLED central control screen and a 35.5-inch AR-HUD, providing a premium driving experience.

Key features of the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) include a robust 100 kWh battery offering a range of 705 km, a maximum power output of 580 kW, and innovative connectivity options. The vehicle emphasizes comfort with dual-chamber air suspension and customizable ambient settings. Overall, the ZEEKR 001 exemplifies a blend of performance, comfort, and advanced technology, solidifying its position in the electric vehicle market.

In October 2023, ZEEKR launched the ZEEKR 001 FR, a high-performance crossover hatchback derived from the original model. This variant features a powerful 100 kWh battery, achieving a staggering 0-100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, and incorporates advanced technologies for enhanced connectivity and intelligence. With a focus on lightweight design and aerodynamics, the ZEEKR 001 FR aims to deliver exceptional performance and safety, further establishing ZEEKR's commitment to innovation in the electric vehicle sector.

title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is ZEEKR's first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) and has quickly established itself in the premium electric vehicle market. Built on the SEA platform, this crossover shooting brake model combines advanced technology with stylish design and versatile functionality, catering to a wide range of customer needs. Its market success is underscored by a significant milestone in October 2022, when ZEEKR delivered over 10,000 units in a single month, marking it as the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to achieve this feat.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring an 800V high-voltage system, a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, and ZEEKR OS 6.0, which enhance performance and charging efficiency. The new model boasts impressive specifications, including a 0-100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds and advanced safety features powered by the Mobileye EVO platform. The interior emphasizes luxury with a spacious cabin, high-definition displays, and premium materials, while the exterior showcases modern aesthetics.

The ZEEKR 001 has consistently demonstrated exceptional performance metrics, with a maximum power output of 580 kW and a range of 705 km. Its comprehensive technology suite includes autonomous driving capabilities and advanced connectivity features. The vehicle's sales have significantly contributed to ZEEKR's revenue growth, with substantial figures reported from 2021 to 2023.

In October 2023, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 001 FR, a high-performance hatchback variant that emphasizes speed and innovative design. This model features a powerful 930 kW output, achieving 0-100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds, and incorporates lightweight materials for improved aerodynamics and performance. Overall, the ZEEKR 001 and its variants reflect the brand's commitment to luxury, technology, and sustainability in the electric vehicle market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content:
Lotus Technology has meticulously designed the ZEEKR 001 to provide a comprehensive and luxurious mobility experience featuring ultimate performance, comfort, and technology. Below are some notable features of the ZEEKR 001 prior to the 2024 upgrade, which demonstrate Lotus Technology's commitment to its mission of creating the ultimate experience of mobility through its technology and solutions since its inception and showcase the performance, comfort, and technology of the ZEEKR 001 delivered so far. • Performance. ZEEKR 001 is equipped with a maximum power of 580 kW and a maximum torque of 810 Nm, significantly better than most of the vehicles developed by other battery electric vehicle (BEV) companies in China, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 can accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in 3.8 seconds, and the braking distance from 100 km/h to a complete stop is only 34.5 meters, delivering both drivability and safety to drivers and passengers. • Comfort. Developed based on the Sustainable Experience Architecture (SEA), ZEEKR 001 features more spacious in-cabin space compared to peer products, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 offers drivers and passengers large legroom to relax during the trip. ZEEKR 001 typically offers a vehicle length of 4,970 mm, a vehicle width of 1,999 mm, a vehicle height of 1,560 mm, and a wheelbase of 3,005 mm. ZEEKR Technology utilizes proprietary and third-party technologies to enable an interactive, immersive, and enjoyable mobility experience. For further details, see “— User Experience.”  
• Technology. ZEEKR Technology incorporates a series of proprietary technologies into ZEEKR 001.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The operating system, ZEEKR OS, enables ZEEKR 001 to be operated efficiently with streamlined underlying capabilities, and ZEEKR Technology has recently launched ZEEKR OS 5.0 with a range of updates. ZEEKR Technology also uses firmware over-the-air (FOTA) updates to continuously enhance ZEEKR 001’s performance. Since the first delivery in October 2021, ZEEKR Technology derived revenues of RMB1,544.3 million, RMB19,671.2 million, and RMB20,635.4 million ($2,906.4 million) from the sales of ZEEKR 001 in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively, representing 23.7%, 61.7%, and 39.9% of ZEEKR Technology's total revenues during the same periods, respectively. In October 2023, ZEEKR Technology released the ZEEKR 001 FR, a cross-over hatchback vehicle model based on the ZEEKR 001. Featuring unique exterior and interior design and proprietary technologies, the ZEEKR 001 FR is designed to offer outstanding vehicle performance with various driving modes. ZEEKR Technology started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. The following diagram illustrates the key features of the ZEEKR 001 FR.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is ZEEKR's inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and developed through proprietary research and market insights, the ZEEKR 001 has received positive feedback for its performance, stylish design, and versatility since deliveries began on October 23, 2021. A notable achievement occurred in October 2022 when ZEEKR delivered 10,119 units in a single month, marking it as the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to surpass this milestone, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system, a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, and ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0 to 100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, advanced safety features through the Mobileye EVO platform, and luxurious interior amenities like a dual-chamber air suspension and a state-of-the-art cockpit with multiple high-definition displays.

The 2024 ZEEKR 001 is powered by a robust 100 kWh battery, offering a CLTC range of 705 km and ultra-fast charging capabilities. It delivers a maximum power output of 580 kW and peak torque of 810 N·m, ensuring exceptional driving performance. The vehicle also incorporates advanced connectivity features, including frameless automatic doors and an augmented reality heads-up display, while its intelligence is enhanced by a high-performance Mobileye EyeQ5H chip for autonomous driving capabilities.

The ZEEKR 001 has generated significant revenue since its launch, with total sales reaching RMB 1,544.3 million in 2021, RMB 19,671.2 million in 2022, and RMB 20,635.4 million in 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 001 FR, a crossover hatchback model that features advanced design and technology, including a maximum power output of 930 kW and acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds. The ZEEKR 001 FR is built on the SEA platform and incorporates lightweight carbon fiber components for improved performance and aerodynamics.

Overall, the ZEEKR 001 and its 2024 model, along with the new ZEEKR 001 FR, exemplify ZEEKR's commitment to delivering a luxurious and technologically advanced electric vehicle experience, emphasizing performance, comfort, and innovative features.

It highlights aspects like battery capacity, maximum power output, technological integrations for both connectivity and intelligence, and the sophisticated comfort systems available in the vehicle.
- Context: Preceding the table, details about the ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) release in March 2024 and its major upgrades including a powerful Qualcomm Snapdragon chip and advanced safety and technology features were provided. [Row Level]
Row 1: The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) has a battery capacity of 100kWh and a CLTC range of 705km. The vehicle is powered by a ternary lithium battery and supports ultra-fast charging with an 800V platform.

Row 2: For performance, the ZEEKR 001 delivers a maximum power of 580kW and accelerates from 0-100 km/h in 3.3 seconds, as indicated by footnote (2). The vehicle has a peak torque of 810N·m and reaches a maximum speed of 240km/h.

Row 3: In terms of connectivity, the ZEEKR 001 features frameless automatic doors, also referred to as Power Doors, and boasts a 35.5-inch AR HUD. The vehicle includes an 8295 intelligent cockpit platform, and its top audio system is provided by YAMAHA.

Row 4: The intelligence of the ZEEKR 001 is supported by a high-performance chip, specifically the 7nm Mobileye EyeQ5H, which works with the Mobileye EVO domain control platform supporting LiDAR. Eye control capabilities are integrated for in-car interaction, and ZEEKR AD is utilized for autonomous driving.

Row 5: Comfort features include a dual-chamber air suspension system and a Smart Magic Carpet feature for active adjustment of the stiffness of air suspension. The Smart Canopy offers light-sensitive control by area, and the Healing Mode includes amenities like ventilation, massage, auto-adjusted light, smell, and temperature.

In October 2023, Lotus Technology released the ZEEKR 001 FR, a cross-over hatchback vehicle model based on the ZEEKR 001. Featuring unique exterior and interior design and proprietary technologies, the ZEEKR 001 FR is designed to offer outstanding vehicle performance with various driving modes. Lotus Technology started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. The following diagram illustrates the key features of the ZEEKR 001 FR.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is ZEEKR's inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV), designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Built on the SEA platform and developed through proprietary research and market insights, the ZEEKR 001 has received positive feedback for its performance, stylish design, and versatility since deliveries began on October 23, 2021. A notable achievement occurred in October 2022 when ZEEKR delivered 10,119 units in a single month, marking it as the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to surpass this milestone, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded 2024 model of the ZEEKR 001, featuring significant enhancements such as an 800V high-voltage system, a Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip, and ZEEKR OS 6.0. This model boasts impressive performance metrics, including a 0 to 100 km/h acceleration time of just 3.3 seconds, advanced safety features through the Mobileye EVO platform, and luxurious interior amenities like a dual-chamber air suspension and a state-of-the-art cockpit with multiple high-definition displays.

The 2024 ZEEKR 001 is powered by a robust 100 kWh battery, offering a CLTC range of 705 km and ultra-fast charging capabilities. It delivers a maximum power output of 580 kW and peak torque of 810 N·m, ensuring exceptional driving performance. The vehicle also incorporates advanced connectivity features, including frameless automatic doors and an augmented reality heads-up display, while its intelligence is enhanced by a high-performance Mobileye EyeQ5H chip for autonomous driving capabilities.

The ZEEKR 001 has generated significant revenue since its launch, with total sales reaching RMB 1,544.3 million in 2021, RMB 19,671.2 million in 2022, and RMB 20,635.4 million in 2023. In October 2023, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 001 FR, a crossover hatchback model that features advanced design and technology, including a maximum power output of 930 kW and acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds. The ZEEKR 001 FR is built on the SEA platform and incorporates lightweight carbon fiber components for improved performance and aerodynamics.

Overall, the ZEEKR 001 and its 2024 model, along with the new ZEEKR 001 FR, exemplify ZEEKR's commitment to delivering a luxurious and technologically advanced electric vehicle experience, emphasizing performance, comfort, and innovative features.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 001 
summary: The ZEEKR 001, launched on April 15, 2021, is the inaugural mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) from ZEEKR, designed as a premium crossover shooting brake. Utilizing proprietary research and development, market insights, and the SEA platform, it offers a stylish vehicle equipped with advanced technologies tailored for the premium BEV market. Since deliveries began on October 23, 2021, the ZEEKR 001 has garnered positive reception due to its impressive performance, appealing design, and versatility, achieving a notable milestone in October 2022 by delivering over 10,000 units in a single month, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle from a Chinese brand to do so.

In February 2024, ZEEKR introduced the upgraded ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), featuring an advanced 800V high-voltage system and powered by the Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chip. This model boasts exceptional performance, accelerating from 0 to 100 km/h in just 3.3 seconds, enhanced safety through the Mobileye EVO platform, and advanced cockpit technology, including a 15.05-inch OLED central control screen. The 2024 model emphasizes luxury and comfort with features like dual-chamber air suspension and a smart magic carpet for active adjustments.

The ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) showcases a robust 100kWh battery with a CLTC range of 705 km, a maximum power output of 580 kW, and peak torque of 810 N·m. It incorporates cutting-edge connectivity features, including a 35.5-inch AR HUD and a premium YAMAHA audio system, alongside intelligent driving capabilities powered by a high-performance Mobileye chip.

In October 2023, ZEEKR launched the ZEEKR 001 FR, a high-performance crossover hatchback derived from the original model. This version emphasizes performance with a 100 kWh battery, a maximum power output of 930 kW, and acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 2.02 seconds. It features advanced connectivity options, including satellite communication and an augmented reality HUD, and incorporates innovative technologies for enhanced safety and autonomous driving capabilities.

Overall, the ZEEKR 001 lineup, including both the 2024 model and the ZEEKR 001 FR, represents significant advancements in luxury electric mobility, combining high performance, advanced technology, and a commitment to sustainability.

all_retrieved_content.page_content:
Lotus Technology has meticulously designed the ZEEKR 001 to provide a comprehensive and luxurious mobility experience featuring ultimate performance, comfort, and technology. Below are some notable features of the ZEEKR 001 prior to the 2024 upgrade, which demonstrate Lotus Technology's commitment to its mission of creating the ultimate experience of mobility life through its technology and solutions since its inception and showcase the performance, comfort, and technology of most of the ZEEKR 001 vehicles delivered so far. • Performance. The ZEEKR 001 is equipped with a max power of 580 kW and a max torque of 810 N·m, significantly better than most of the vehicles developed by other BEV companies in China, according to Frost & Sullivan. The ZEEKR 001 can accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in 3.8 seconds, and the braking distance from 100 km/h to a complete stop is only 34.5 meters, delivering both drivability and safety to drivers and passengers. • Comfort. Developed based on the SEA platform, the ZEEKR 001 features more spacious in-cabin space compared to peer products, according to Frost & Sullivan. The ZEEKR 001 offers drivers and passengers large legroom to relax during the trip. The ZEEKR 001 typically offers a 4,970 mm vehicle length, a 1,999 mm vehicle width, a 1,560 mm vehicle height, and a 3,005 mm wheelbase. Lotus Technology utilizes proprietary and third-party technologies to enable an interactive, immersive, and enjoyable mobility experience. For further details, see “— User Experience.”   
• Technology. Lotus Technology incorporates a series of proprietary technologies into the ZEEKR 001.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. The company's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. The current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to Lotus Technology's mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an innovative and rapidly expanding battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company committed to transforming the automobile industry through electrification and advanced technology. With a focus on next-generation premium BEVs, ZEEKR leverages strong in-house research and development capabilities, a flexible organizational structure, and a deep understanding of customer needs to efficiently develop and launch products. The company has established a prominent position in the premium BEV market with models such as the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan, all emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

Since its inception in October 2021, ZEEKR has achieved remarkable milestones, including the rapid delivery of 196,633 vehicles by December 2023, with 192,441 units sold in China alone. The ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, has been particularly successful, reaching 10,000 units delivered within four months of its launch. The company benefits from the extensive resources and industry experience of its parent company, Geely Group, which enhances ZEEKR's product innovation and operational efficiency.

ZEEKR's technological advancements are supported by its proprietary SEA platform, enabling a diverse range of vehicle types and facilitating the integration of cutting-edge technologies. The company is also focused on enhancing the customer experience through a direct-to-consumer sales model and a comprehensive network of customer touchpoints across China. Additionally, ZEEKR is expanding its charging infrastructure and forming strategic partnerships with leading firms to support its growth and global expansion.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In February 2024, Lotus Technology released an upgraded model of ZEEKR 001, or ZEEKR 001 (2024 model). Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in March 2024. In October 2023, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 FR, a cross-over hatchback vehicle model based on ZEEKR 001. Featuring unique exterior and interior design and proprietary technologies, ZEEKR 001 FR is designed to offer outstanding vehicle performance with various driving modes. Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. • ZEEKR 009. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second model, ZEEKR 009, a luxury six-seater MPV model providing a comfortable, ultra-luxury mobility experience for both families and business uses. ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first premium MPV based on a pure-electric platform, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 009 has enjoyed wide popularity since launch, and Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 009 to customers in January 2023. • ZEEKR X. In April 2023, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR X, a compact SUV model featuring spacious interior design, advanced technology, and superior driving performance. Lotus Technology began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. • ZEEKR Upscale Sedan Model. In November 2023, Lotus Technology launched its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. Powered by 800V architecture and multi-link suspension structure, the upscale sedan model is expected to achieve a 2.84 s 0-100 km/h acceleration and a 688 km maximum CLTC range. Lotus Technology began the delivery of the first upscale sedan model in January 2024.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an innovative and rapidly expanding battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company committed to transforming the automobile industry through electrification and advanced technology. With a focus on next-generation premium BEVs, ZEEKR leverages strong in-house research and development capabilities, a flexible organizational structure, and a deep understanding of customer needs to efficiently develop and launch products. The company has established a prominent position in the premium BEV market with models such as the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan, all emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

Since its inception in October 2021, ZEEKR has achieved remarkable milestones, including the rapid delivery of 196,633 vehicles by December 2023, with 192,441 units sold in China alone. The ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, has been particularly successful, reaching 10,000 units delivered within four months of its launch. The company benefits from the extensive resources and industry experience of its parent company, Geely Group, which enhances ZEEKR's product innovation and operational efficiency.

ZEEKR's technological advancements are supported by its proprietary SEA platform, enabling a diverse range of vehicle types and facilitating the integration of cutting-edge technologies. The company is also focused on enhancing the customer experience through a direct-to-consumer sales model and a comprehensive network of customer touchpoints across China. Additionally, ZEEKR is expanding its charging infrastructure and forming strategic partnerships with leading firms to support its growth and global expansion.

The BEV market is experiencing significant growth, particularly in China, where sales are projected to increase dramatically in the coming years. ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this trend by expanding its vehicle portfolio and exploring new markets, including the robotaxi sector in the United States. With a strong management team and a commitment to customer-centric operations, ZEEKR is well-positioned to lead the future of premium electric mobility.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology's current and future BEV models will define the company's success. Going forward, Lotus Technology plans to capture the extensive potential of the premium BEV market globally through an expanding portfolio of vehicles. For instance, Lotus Technology plans to launch vehicles for next-generation mobility lifestyles. Through these future models, Lotus Technology intends to provide premium mobility solutions of innovation, comfort, and intelligence, as well as a spacious and luxurious high-tech experience with enhanced performance. As a testament to the popularity of Lotus Technology's current products and capabilities, Lotus Technology has achieved a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months after the initial delivery, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end NEV models and premium BEV models in China. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China. This is among the fastest delivery growth in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The development of Lotus Technology's BEV models is powered by SEA, a set of open-source, electric and modularized platforms owned by Geely Holding compatible with A segment to E segment, covering sedan, SUV, MPV, hatchback, roadster, pick-up truck, and robotaxi, which have a wheelbase mainly between 1,800 mm to 3,300 mm. Lotus Technology depends on Geely Holding to allow the company to continue to utilize SEA, which is currently the most suitable platform for Lotus Technology. The widely compatible SEA enables robust R&D capabilities, execution efficiency, cost efficiency, and control consistency in the vehicle development process, giving Lotus Technology's BEVs significant competitive advantages in the market. SEA also offers the flexibility to quickly adopt and accommodate the latest and most advanced technology improvements. For example, Lotus Technology was able to equip ZEEKR 009 with CATL’s latest Qilin battery, making ZEEKR 009 the first mass-produced BEV model equipped with Qilin battery, according to Frost & Sullivan. Together with Lotus Technology's proprietary advanced battery solutions and highly efficient electric drive system, ZEEKR 009’s extended range version is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with an over 800 km CLTC range and the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024, according to Frost & Sullivan.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has strong in-house technological capabilities focusing on electrification and intelligentization. Lotus Technology's in-house design, engineering, and R&D enable the company to achieve high product development efficiency and rapid product iteration, as well as to provide engineering services to external parties. In particular, Lotus Technology's in-house capabilities are also supported by (i) the Sweden-based R&D center CEVT in the research and development of intelligent mobility solutions, and (ii) Ningbo Viridi, Lotus Technology's PRC subsidiary focused on the products and systems relating to battery, motor and electric control, power solutions, and energy storage. Leveraging Lotus Technology's in-house E/E Architecture design and operating system, ZEEKR OS, the company continuously updates its BEV functions through effective and efficient FOTA. Lotus Technology deploys cutting-edge autonomous driving technology into its BEVs by world-leading players such as Mobileye and has also announced its plan to integrate. Lotus Technology will integrate NVIDIA DRIVE Thor, the 2,000 TOPS AV superchip, into its centralized vehicle computer for the next generation intelligent BEV. Lotus Technology also offers an intelligent cockpit to deliver interactive, immersive, and enjoyable driving experiences. To successfully achieve its mission, Lotus Technology assembled a top-notch management team with diversified yet complementary backgrounds and experiences. Lotus Technology's management team possesses entrepreneurial spirit, deep automotive and technology sector expertise along with customer-centric operation experience, which are essential to driving the company's future development.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology's co-founder and CEO Conghui An has over 25 years’ experience in multiple executive management positions in Geely Group and accumulated profound industry insights and senior management experience with an excellent track record. In addition to ZEEKR, Mr. An has successfully established, developed, and operated both Geely and Lynk&Co, two well-established vehicle brands of Geely Group. Lotus Technology is guided by its customer-oriented principle to provide customers with service and experience in every aspect of their journey with the company. Lotus Technology adopts a customer-oriented direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales model with a focus on innovative and interactive engagement with its customers. Lotus Technology has established extensive customer touchpoints including 24 ZEEKR Centers, 240 ZEEKR Spaces, 31 ZEEKR Delivery Centers, and 45 ZEEKR Houses in China, and two ZEEKR Centers overseas as of December 31, 2023. In addition, Lotus Technology closely interacts with customers by building an integrated online and offline customer community to provide a holistic experience that goes beyond the purchase of intelligent battery electric vehicles (BEVs). Within the ZEEKR APP, customers can enjoy one-stop car purchase, charging solutions, financial services, roadside assistance, intelligent car control, online shopping of ZEEKR lifestyle products, social interaction, and seamless communication with the customer services team. Lotus Technology also holds a variety of offline customer events to nurture a vibrant ZEEKR user community. The company's customer engagement efforts enable Lotus Technology to better understand customer needs to be incorporated into future product design and continuously strengthen customer loyalty and stickiness.
