metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV that has quickly gained popularity, with deliveries commencing in January 2023. Designed for families and business groups, it emphasizes safety, comfort, and performance. 

In terms of safety, the ZEEKR 009 features a one-piece high-strength aluminum body that effectively absorbs impacts and is the first MPV to pass the frontal center column collision test, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan. It also includes advanced driving assistance technologies akin to those found in the ZEEKR 001.

Comfort is a key aspect, with a spacious cabin of approximately 7.4 square meters, accommodating six leather chairs equipped with massage functions. The vehicle boasts a generous wheelbase of 3,205 mm, a width of 2,024 mm, and an air suspension system that adjusts ground clearance for a smooth ride. Passengers can enjoy a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted entertainment screen and an intelligent in-cabin interaction system.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery, offering an extended range version that achieves over 800 km of CLTC range, making it the longest all-electric range available by February 2024. It delivers a maximum power of 400 kW and a torque of 686 N·m, with the ability to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds.

The ZEEKR 009 ME model features a robust 140 kWh battery and an all-wheel drive system, further enhancing its performance capabilities. It includes advanced connectivity options, such as a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted screen, a 10.25-inch instrument cluster, and an AI Mate smart assistant, supported by a premium YAMAHA audio system. 

In April 2024, ZEEKR introduced the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant that focuses on enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, featuring an $800V electrical system and dual Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chips for a highly intelligent driving experience. Since its launch, the ZEEKR 009 has generated significant revenue, contributing 17.2% to the company’s total revenues, amounting to approximately RMB 8,896.6 million (around US$1,253.1 million). metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving the electrification and innovation of the automotive industry through the development of premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: • The ZEEKR 009 can be equipped with (i) $140 \mathrm{kWh}$ Qilin battery packs or (ii) $116 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery packs, both developed by CATL, depending on different vehicle versions. The ZEEKR 009 is expected to become the first mass-produced BEV model equipped with CATL’s Qilin battery, which gives the ZEEKR 009 an $822 \mathrm{km}$ maximum CLTC range. • The ZEEKR X is equipped with $66 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery packs, which enable the ZEEKR X a $560 \mathrm{km}$ or $512 \mathrm{km}$ maximum CLTC range depending on different vehicle versions. The battery packs developed by Ningbo Viridi can also be enhanced by Ningbo Viridi's proprietary battery management system, or BMS, to manage and optimize the battery performance, durability, and safety. For details of the battery solutions and technologies of Ningbo Viridi, see “— Ningbo Viridi.”

metadata.title_summary:
title: Battery Solutions 
summary: ZEEKR vehicles are designed with a strong focus on reliable battery solutions that emphasize safety, efficiency, and durability. The lineup includes the ZEEKR 001, 009, and X models, each offering various battery options developed by CATL that deliver impressive performance and charging capabilities.

The ZEEKR 001 is available with 100 kWh or 86 kWh battery packs, with the 100 kWh version utilizing Ni55 battery cells to achieve a maximum CLTC range of 741 km. It can charge from 10% to 80% in just 30 minutes and travel 120 km after a five-minute charge. The 2024 model can also be equipped with CATL's innovative Qilin battery, boasting an expected range of over 1,000 km, making it the first mass-produced battery electric vehicle (BEV) to achieve this milestone. The Qilin battery packs provide a range of 750 km, with the ability to cover 210 km after a brief five-minute charge.

The ZEEKR 009 offers either 140 kWh or 116 kWh Qilin battery packs, with the 140 kWh version projected to deliver a maximum CLTC range of 822 km, also marking it as a pioneering mass-produced BEV with this advanced battery technology.

The ZEEKR X features 66 kWh battery packs, allowing for a maximum CLTC range of 560 km or 512 km, depending on the specific vehicle version.

Overall, ZEEKR vehicles leverage cutting-edge battery technology and efficient charging systems to enhance the driving experience through extended ranges and rapid recharge times. Additionally, Ningbo Viridi has developed battery packs that can be optimized with its proprietary battery management system (BMS), further improving performance, durability, and safety. For more details on Ningbo Viridi's battery solutions, refer to the section titled “— Ningbo Viridi.”

all_retrieved_content.page_content:
Lotus Technology's second battery electric vehicle (BEV) model, ZEEKR 009, is a luxury six-seater multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) featuring a comfortable mobility experience. ZEEKR 009 was officially launched on November 1, 2022, following which Lotus Technology began taking reservations. ZEEKR 009 enjoyed wide popularity since launch, and Lotus Technology commenced delivery in January 2023. Targeted at families and business groups, the ZEEKR 009 is purposely designed to deliver safety, comfort, and durability. • Safety. The vehicle body of ZEEKR 009 is made of one-piece high-strength rear-end aluminum to effectively absorb impacts in a collision. As a testament of its safety, ZEEKR 009 is the first multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) model that passed the frontal center column collision test in the world, according to Frost & Sullivan. Similar to ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 009 uses leading driving assistance technologies to ensure improved driving safety. For details, see “— Our Competitive Strengths — Industry-leading Technology and R&D Capabilities Supporting Product Leadership and Fast Iteration.”   
• Comfort. ZEEKR 009 provides passengers with complete comfort and relaxation during the trip. With a wheelbase of 3,205 mm and a width of 2,024 mm, ZEEKR 009 holds six leather chairs in a spacious vehicle cabin of approximately 7.4 square meters. Passengers can also enjoy a variety of entertainment on the road with the ceiling-mounted 15.6-inch screen and intelligent in-cabin interaction system. Chairs in the first two rows are also equipped with a massage function.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is the brand's second battery electric vehicle (BEV), designed as a luxury six-seater MPV that emphasizes a comfortable mobility experience for families and business groups. Following its successful launch, deliveries commenced in January 2023, and the model quickly gained popularity, contributing significantly to ZEEKR's revenues.

This cutting-edge MPV prioritizes safety, comfort, and performance. It features a high-strength aluminum body that effectively absorbs impacts, making it the first MPV globally to pass the frontal center column collision test, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan. Advanced driving assistance technologies enhance overall safety, mirroring those found in the ZEEKR 001.

The spacious interior, measuring approximately 7.4 square meters, accommodates six leather chairs and includes a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted entertainment screen, an intelligent interaction system, and massage functions for added comfort. The vehicle's air suspension system optimizes ground clearance for accessibility.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery and advanced electric drive technology, offering an impressive range of over 800 km (CLTC) and a maximum power output of 400 kW with a torque of 686 N·m. It accelerates from 0-100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds, making it the longest-range pure-electric MPV available by February 2024.

Key specifications include a length of 5,209 mm, a width of 2,024 mm, and a wheelbase of 3,205 mm. The vehicle is equipped with a 140 kWh battery, twin electric motors with all-wheel drive (AWD), and advanced connectivity features, including a premium YAMAHA audio system and AI-powered smart assistant.

In April 2024, ZEEKR introduced the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant that enhances safety, privacy, and intelligence features, utilizing an 800V electrical system and two Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chips for advanced capabilities in both front and rear cabins. Overall, the ZEEKR 009 and its Grand variant exemplify a commitment to delivering a high-tech, comfortable, and performance-oriented driving experience.

In February 2024, Lotus Technology released an upgraded model of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model). Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in March 2024. In October 2023, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 FR, its cross-over hatchback vehicle model based on ZEEKR 001. Featuring unique exterior and interior design and proprietary technologies, ZEEKR 001 FR is designed to offer outstanding vehicle performance with various driving modes. Lotus Technology started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023. • ZEEKR 009. In November 2022, Lotus Technology launched its second model, ZEEKR 009, a luxury six-seater MPV model providing a comfortable, ultra-luxury mobility experience for both families and business uses. ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first premium MPV based on a pure-electric platform, according to Frost & Sullivan. summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV that emphasizes safety, comfort, and performance, making it ideal for families and business groups. Following a successful reservation period, deliveries commenced in January 2023, quickly leading to significant popularity and impressive sales, generating approximately US$ 1.25 billion in revenue by early 2023.

The vehicle's comfort is highlighted by a spacious cabin of around 7.4 square meters, accommodating six leather chairs with massage functions in the front rows. Its generous dimensions, including a wheelbase of 3,205 mm and a width of 2,024 mm, provide ample space for passengers. Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery and advanced electric drive systems, achieving a remarkable range of over 800 km on the CLTC cycle, making it the longest-range all-electric MPV available by February 2024. It boasts a maximum power output of 400 kW and a torque of 686 N·m, allowing for rapid acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds.

Overall, the ZEEKR 009 combines cutting-edge technology, luxurious comfort, and robust safety features, positioning itself as a modern and efficient vehicle for discerning customers.

Connectivity features include a 10.25-inch instrument cluster, an AI Mate smart assistant, and a premium YAMAHA audio system. The vehicle’s intelligence is enhanced by a Mobileye EyeQ5H chip and the Falcon Eye Vidar system for improved vision and an advanced autonomous driving experience.

The carefree back-seat entry system uses automatic door and seat mechanisms for added convenience.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV designed for families and business groups, focusing on safety, comfort, and performance. Following its launch, it quickly gained popularity, leading to reservations and deliveries starting in January 2023. 

Safety features include a one-piece high-strength aluminum body that effectively absorbs impacts, making it the first MPV globally to pass the frontal center column collision test. It also incorporates advanced driving assistance technologies akin to those in the ZEEKR 001. 

In terms of comfort, the ZEEKR 009 boasts a spacious cabin of approximately 7.4 square meters with six luxurious leather chairs, a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted screen, and an intelligent in-cabin interaction system. The vehicle is equipped with an air suspension system that adjusts ground clearance for optimal comfort, and the first two rows of seats feature massage functionality.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery, offering an impressive range of over 800 km (CLTC) and a dual electric motor system that delivers a maximum power of 400 kW and torque of 686 N·m, achieving 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds. 

Connectivity features include a 10.25-inch instrument cluster, an AI Mate smart assistant, and a premium YAMAHA audio system. The vehicle’s intelligence is enhanced by a Mobileye EyeQ5H chip and the Falcon Eye Vidar system for improved vision and an advanced autonomous driving experience.

Since its introduction, the ZEEKR 009 has generated substantial revenue, accounting for 17.2% of the company's total revenue in its first year. In April 2024, ZEEKR expanded its lineup with the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant that emphasizes enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, featuring a robust electrical system and advanced processing capabilities for a superior driving experience. Overall, the ZEEKR 009 exemplifies the brand's commitment to innovation in electric mobility and intelligent driving technologies, appealing to a premium market with its luxurious offerings.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Note: This chart shows the configuration of the ZEEKR 009 ME model. Since the first delivery in January 2023, ZEEKR derived revenues of RMB8,896.6 million (US$1,253.1 million) from the sales of ZEEKR 009 in 2023, representing 17.2% of ZEEKR's total revenues during the same period. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of the ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. The ZEEKR 009 Grand is equipped with an 800 V electrical system supported by CATL’s Qilin battery. To deliver a highly intelligent driving experience, the ZEEKR 009 Grand is powered by two Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chips to serve the front and rear cabin.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV that has quickly gained popularity, with deliveries commencing in January 2023. Designed for families and business groups, it emphasizes safety, comfort, and performance. 

In terms of safety, the ZEEKR 009 features a one-piece high-strength aluminum body that effectively absorbs impacts and is the first MPV to pass the frontal center column collision test, as recognized by Frost & Sullivan. It also includes advanced driving assistance technologies akin to those found in the ZEEKR 001.

Comfort is a key aspect, with a spacious cabin of approximately 7.4 square meters, accommodating six leather chairs equipped with massage functions. The vehicle boasts a generous wheelbase of 3,205 mm, a width of 2,024 mm, and an air suspension system that adjusts ground clearance for a smooth ride. Passengers can enjoy a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted entertainment screen and an intelligent in-cabin interaction system.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery, offering an extended range version that achieves over 800 km of CLTC range, making it the longest all-electric range available by February 2024. It delivers a maximum power of 400 kW and a torque of 686 N·m, with the ability to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds.

The ZEEKR 009 ME model features a robust 140 kWh battery and an all-wheel drive system, further enhancing its performance capabilities. It includes advanced connectivity options, such as a 15.6-inch ceiling-mounted screen, a 10.25-inch instrument cluster, and an AI Mate smart assistant, supported by a premium YAMAHA audio system. 

In April 2024, ZEEKR introduced the ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury variant that focuses on enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence, featuring an $800V electrical system and dual Qualcomm Snapdragon 8295 chips for a highly intelligent driving experience. Since its launch, the ZEEKR 009 has generated significant revenue, contributing 17.2% to the company’s total revenues, amounting to approximately RMB 8,896.6 million (around US$1,253.1 million). Overall, the ZEEKR 009 represents a modern blend of luxury, advanced technology, and performance in the MPV segment.

[Table Level]
- Table Title: Key Features and Specifications of ZEEKR 009 ME Model
- Table Summary: The table outlines various specifications and features of the ZEEKR 009 ME model across several categories including size, power, performance, connectivity, intelligence, and comfort. Each category provides detailed numerical values and technological terms that describe the capacities, dimensions, and advanced systems installed in the vehicle.
- Context: The ZEEKR 009 is recognized for its safety and comfort, featuring an innovative ergonomic design with industry-leading technology. The multi-purpose vehicle (MPV) model stands out for its electric range and driving assistance capabilities, promising enhanced performance and passenger experiences.

metadata.title_summary:
title: ZEEKR 009 
summary: The ZEEKR 009, launched on November 1, 2022, is a luxury six-seater MPV that emphasizes safety, comfort, and performance, making it ideal for families and business groups. Following a successful reservation period, deliveries commenced in January 2023, quickly leading to significant popularity and impressive sales, generating approximately US$ 1.25 billion in revenue by early 2023.

In terms of safety, the ZEEKR 009 features a one-piece high-strength aluminum body that excels in impact absorption, becoming the first MPV to pass the frontal center column collision test. It is equipped with advanced driving assistance technologies to further enhance safety on the road.

The vehicle's comfort is highlighted by a spacious cabin of around 7.4 square meters, accommodating six leather chairs with massage functions in the front rows. Its generous dimensions, including a wheelbase of 3,205 mm and a width of 2,024 mm, provide ample space for passengers. Entertainment options include a ceiling-mounted 15.6-inch screen and an intelligent in-cabin interaction system, while an adjustable air suspension system enhances ride comfort.

Performance-wise, the ZEEKR 009 is powered by CATL’s Qilin battery and advanced electric drive systems, achieving a remarkable range of over 800 km on the CLTC cycle, making it the longest-range all-electric MPV available by February 2024. It boasts a maximum power output of 400 kW and a torque of 686 N·m, allowing for rapid acceleration from 0 to 100 km/h in just 4.5 seconds.

Overall, the ZEEKR 009 combines cutting-edge technology, luxurious comfort, and robust safety features, positioning itself as a modern and efficient vehicle for discerning customers.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Lotus Technology is an independently-run startup-style company relying on its in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and self-owned sales and marketing network, among others. Lotus Technology adopts a flat and efficient organizational structure led by key management with diversified backgrounds. Since inception, Lotus Technology has been managed and directed by its executive officers, and save for Conghui An, who is currently an executive director of Geely Auto, none of Lotus Technology's executive officers are members of management of Geely Auto. Additionally, Mr. An is expected to not hold any positions in Geely Auto prior to or upon the completion of the offering. While Lotus Technology's chairman, Shufu Li, is also the chairman of Geely Auto, upon the completion of the offering, the directors that Lotus Technology shares in common with Geely Auto will not have executive roles at Lotus Technology. Lotus Technology has been dedicated to serving its customers by leveraging top-notch technology, advanced product concepts, and an enriched entrepreneurial spirit that embraces creativity and innovation. ZEEKR is strategically positioned as a premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) brand that delivers an ultimate experience covering driving, charging, after-sale service, and customer community engagement. ZEEKR’s product family meets a wide spectrum of customer needs in different mobility and travel scenarios and is highly customized with a wide selection of vehicle configurations.

metadata.title_summary:
title: An Innovative Automotive Technology Company with Strong Product Offering to Capture Massive Premium BEV Market Opportunity 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company dedicated to creating premium electric vehicles and innovative solutions that promote the electrification and intelligentization of the automotive sector. Operating as an independent startup, ZEEKR utilizes its in-house research and development capabilities alongside a proprietary sales and marketing network, all managed by a diverse and efficient leadership team. Notably, while some executives have ties to Geely Auto, they will not hold executive roles post-offering, ensuring a distinct operational identity.

Since its launch less than three years ago, ZEEKR has introduced several models, including the ZEEKR 001, a five-seater crossover, the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, and the compact ZEEKR X SUV, among others. The brand has garnered significant market attention, achieving rapid sales milestones, such as 10,000 deliveries of the ZEEKR 001 shortly after its release, positioning it as one of China’s fastest-selling premium BEVs.

ZEEKR vehicles are built on Geely Holding's proprietary SEA platform, which facilitates swift development and launch of new models while ensuring exceptional performance and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 are recognized for their impressive range capabilities, with the ZEEKR 009 being the first pure-electric MPV to exceed 800 km in range. Additionally, ZEEKR incorporates advanced autonomous driving technologies powered by cutting-edge hardware, enhancing both performance and safety.

The company emphasizes customer satisfaction through a focus on innovative technology and premium features, such as customizable in-vehicle configurations and luxurious amenities in models like the ZEEKR 009 Grand, which includes heated massaging seats and high-quality entertainment systems. Overall, ZEEKR is committed to delivering a holistic smart mobility experience, setting a high standard in the premium BEV market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Within less than three years since ZEEKR’s inception, ZEEKR has launched multiple commercialized electric vehicle models, namely ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001 is a five-seater crossover shooting brake BEV model targeting the premium market and mainly addressing the customer need for practical yet stylish traveling. ZEEKR released ZEEKR 001 (2024 model) in February 2024 and started vehicle delivery in March 2024. ZEEKR 009 is a luxury six-seater MPV addressing the customer need for luxury mobility. In April 2023, ZEEKR released ZEEKR X, the compact SUV model, and began to deliver ZEEKR X in June 2023. ZEEKR also started to deliver ZEEKR 001 FR in November 2023 and began to deliver the first upscale sedan model in January 2024. In addition to major upgrades such as the release of ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), ZEEKR has also been continuously fine-tuning and improving the performance of other BEV models. For example, ZEEKR updated the interior configurations of ZEEKR 009 and improved the chassis system of ZEEKR X in 2024. In April 2024, ZEEKR launched ZEEKR 009 Grand, a luxury version of ZEEKR 009 featuring enhanced safety, privacy, and intelligence. ZEEKR also released ZEEKR MIX, the MPV model, in the same month.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: ZEEKR's products have been well received by the market, achieving a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months since its initial delivery in October 2021, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle (NEV) models and premium BEV models in China. Lotus Technology's current and future models will be primarily based on Geely Holding’s proprietary SEA, which is highly agile, compatible, and enables Lotus Technology to quickly build and launch a wide range of vehicle models catering to different demands in the premium BEV segment. Developed based on SEA, ZEEKR vehicles embody impressive vehicle performance, FOTA-enabled upgrades, superior driving and riding experiences, as well as striking and trendy designs that provide a comprehensive smart mobility experience to Lotus Technology's customers. • Outstanding battery and range performance. The up-to- $100 \mathrm{kWh}$ battery supports a maximum CLTC range of $741 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 and $750 \mathrm{km}$ on ZEEKR 001 (2024 model), respectively, which is ahead of most of the BEV models of Lotus Technology's peers, according to Frost & Sullivan. According to Frost & Sullivan, ZEEKR 009 is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with over $800 \mathrm{km}$ CLTC range, and it has the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024. • State-of-the-art autonomous driving expertise.

Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. Lotus Technology's current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

Lotus Technology's management team possesses entrepreneurial spirit, deep automotive and technology sector expertise along with customer-centric operation experience, which are essential to driving Lotus Technology's future development.

Lotus Technology also holds a variety of offline customer events to nurture a vibrant ZEEKR user community. Lotus Technology's customer engagement efforts enable the company to better understand customer needs to be incorporated into future product design and continuously strengthen customer loyalty and stickiness.

The ultra charging stations, in particular, provide users with an ultimate charging experience through Lotus Technology's proprietary ultra-fast charging technology developed by Ningbo Viridi. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 ZEEKR charging stations with different charging capabilities, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China, further supported by over 54 thousand third-party charging stations that cover over 340 cities in China with approximately 610 thousand charging piles in total. Lotus Technology has established in-depth partnerships with a number of internationally renowned smart mobility companies, laying a solid foundation for Lotus Technology's business development and global expansion. For example, Lotus Technology collaborates with Mobileye, a subsidiary of Intel and one of Lotus Technology's strategic investors, for consumer-ready autonomous driving solutions. Lotus Technology is working with Waymo, a leader in L4 autonomous driving technology, to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet. The vehicles are purpose-built TaaS vehicles based on SEA-M, which is an advanced version of SEA and a high-tech mobility solution that supports a range of future mobility products including robotaxis and logistics vehicles.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving the electrification and innovation of the automotive industry through the development of premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: This is among the fastest delivery growth in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan. The development of Lotus Technology's BEV models is powered by SEA, a set of open-source, electric and modularized platforms owned by Geely Holding compatible with A segment to E segment, covering sedan, SUV, MPV, hatchback, roadster, pick-up truck, and robotaxi, which have a wheelbase mainly between 1,800 mm to 3,300 mm. Lotus Technology depends on Geely Holding to allow the company to continue to utilize SEA, which is currently the most suitable platform for Lotus Technology. The widely compatible SEA enables robust R&D capabilities, execution efficiency, cost efficiency, and control consistency in the vehicle development process, giving Lotus Technology's BEVs significant competitive advantages in the market. SEA also offers the flexibility to quickly adopt and accommodate the latest and most advanced technology improvements. For example, Lotus Technology was able to equip ZEEKR 009 with CATL’s latest Qilin battery, making ZEEKR 009 the first mass-produced BEV model equipped with Qilin battery, according to Frost & Sullivan. Together with Lotus Technology's proprietary advanced battery solutions and highly efficient electric drive system, ZEEKR 009’s extended range version is the world’s first pure-electric MPV model with an over 800 km CLTC range and the longest all-electric range in the MPV market by the end of February 2024, according to Frost & Sullivan.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: As a premium BEV brand incubated by Geely Group, Lotus Technology inherits unique competitive edges from Geely Group that are developed through years of execution experience at the frontier of the industry, such as innovative and agile engineering capabilities, robust R&D capabilities, deep industry expertise, extreme attention to safety, top-notch professionals, strong supply chain and manufacturing management capabilities, and operational know-how. Geely Group’s powerful and world-class brand equity also echoes product innovation, performance, and reliability in its broad customer base, which, in turn, contributes to the significant consumer interest and demand for the ZEEKR brand. These competitive advantages enable Lotus Technology to quickly incorporate customer needs and concepts into its products and manage the complex operation process to achieve the fast ramp-up of production and deliveries. Lotus Technology also leverages Geely Group’s advanced and well-established manufacturing capacity, which helps retain effective oversight over key steps in procurement, manufacturing, and product quality control with minimal capital outlay. At the same time, Lotus Technology's BEVs are manufactured at the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Hangzhou Bay New Zone owned by Geely Holding (the “ZEEKR Factory”), the manufacturing plant in Chengdu owned by Geely Auto (the “Chengdu Factory”), or the manufacturing plant in Ningbo Beilun District owned by Geely Holding (the “Meishan Factory”), and Geely Holding was Lotus Technology's largest supplier for 2022 and 2023. Furthermore, before the launch of ZEEKR 001, a significant portion of Lotus Technology's revenue has historically been derived from the sales of batteries and other components and research and development services to Geely Group.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has strong in-house technological capabilities focusing on electrification and intelligentization. Lotus Technology's in-house design, engineering, and R&D enable the company to achieve high product development efficiency and rapid product iteration, as well as to provide engineering services to external parties. In particular, Lotus Technology's in-house capabilities are also supported by (i) the Sweden-based R&D center CEVT in the research and development of intelligent mobility solutions, and (ii) Ningbo Viridi, Lotus Technology's PRC subsidiary focused on the products and systems relating to battery, motor and electric control, power solutions, and energy storage. Leveraging Lotus Technology's in-house E/E Architecture design and operating system, ZEEKR OS, Lotus Technology continuously updates its BEV functions through effective and efficient FOTA. Lotus Technology deploys cutting-edge autonomous driving technology into its BEVs by world-leading players such as Mobileye, and has also announced its plan to integrate NVIDIA DRIVE Thor, the 2,000 TOPS AV superchip, into its centralized vehicle computer for the next generation intelligent BEV. Lotus Technology also offers an intelligent cockpit to deliver interactive, immersive, and enjoyable driving experiences. To successfully achieve its mission, Lotus Technology assembled a top-notch management team with diversified yet complementary backgrounds and experiences. Lotus Technology's management team possesses entrepreneurial spirit, deep automotive and technology sector expertise along with customer-centric operation experience, which are essential to driving the company's future development. Lotus Technology's co-founder and CEO Conghui An has over 25 years of experience in multiple executive management positions in Geely Group and accumulated profound industry insights and senior management experience with an excellent track record.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In addition to ZEEKR, Mr. An has successfully established, developed, and operated both Geely and Lynk&Co, two well-established vehicle brands of Geely Group. Lotus Technology is guided by its customer-oriented principle to provide customers with service and experience in every aspect of their journey with the company. Lotus Technology adopts a customer-oriented direct-to-consumer (DTC) sales model with a focus on innovative and interactive engagement with its customers. Lotus Technology has established extensive customer touchpoints including 24 ZEEKR Centers, 240 ZEEKR Spaces, 31 ZEEKR Delivery Centers, and 45 ZEEKR Houses in China, and two ZEEKR Centers overseas as of December 31, 2023. In addition, Lotus Technology closely interacts with customers by building an integrated online and offline customer community to provide a holistic experience that goes beyond the purchase of intelligent battery electric vehicles (BEVs). Within the ZEEKR APP, customers can enjoy one-stop car purchase, charging solutions, financial services, roadside assistance, intelligent car control, online shopping of ZEEKR lifestyle products, social interaction, and seamless communication with the customer services team. Lotus Technology also holds a variety of offline customer events to nurture a vibrant ZEEKR user community. These customer engagement efforts enable Lotus Technology to better understand customer needs to be incorporated into future product design and continuously strengthen customer loyalty and stickiness. Underpinned by its superior capability in supply chain and manufacturing planning and management, Lotus Technology is also able to offer a wide range of customized options in terms of vehicle designs and functionalities, which are highly appreciated by its customers.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has established a comprehensive charging network and provided hassle-free charging services through at-home charging solutions, on-the-road charging solutions, and 24/7 charging fleets. The ultra charging stations, in particular, provide users with an ultimate charging experience through Lotus Technology's proprietary ultra-fast charging technology developed by Ningbo Viridi. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 ZEEKR charging stations with different charging capabilities, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China, further supported by over 54 thousand third-party charging stations that cover over 340 cities in China with approximately 610 thousand charging piles in total. Lotus Technology has established in-depth partnerships with a number of internationally renowned smart mobility companies, laying a solid foundation for its business development and global expansion. For example, Lotus Technology collaborates with Mobileye, a subsidiary of Intel and one of its strategic investors, for consumer-ready autonomous driving solutions. Going forward, Lotus Technology will continue to deepen its collaboration with Mobileye. Lotus Technology is working with Waymo, a leader in L4 autonomous driving technology, to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet. The vehicles are purpose-built TaaS vehicles based on SEA-M, which is an advanced version of SEA and a high-tech mobility solution that supports a range of future mobility products including robotaxis and logistics vehicles. Furthermore, Lotus Technology has deep relationships with a range of leading suppliers, such as CATL, Bosch, and Aptiv.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In addition, Lotus Technology has a relationship with Onsemi, a leader in intelligent power and sensor technologies. Lotus Technology will be provided with Onsemi’s EliteSiC, its silicon carbide power devices, to enhance the performance, charging efficiency, and driving range for its BEV products. Lotus Technology operates in a rapidly growing market with extensive potential. Driven by improving battery and smart technologies, supportive regulatory policies, and enhancement of charging infrastructure, China’s battery electric vehicle (BEV) market has substantial room for growth in both volume and BEV penetration. China’s BEV sales volume is expected to be approximately five times greater, reaching 13.7 million units in 2028 from 2021, according to Frost & Sullivan. The premium BEV market is expected to experience even faster growth, almost increasing. to over seven times the volume in 2021 by 2028, according to Frost & Sullivan. The European battery electric vehicle (BEV) market has significant size and growth potential, which is expected to reach 5.3 million units in sales volume in 2028, representing a CAGR of 18.6% from 2024 to 2028, according to Frost & Sullivan. In the future, Lotus Technology also plans to tap into the robotaxi market in the United States. In December 2023, Lotus Technology started to deliver the ZEEKR 001 in Europe. Lotus Technology's revenue from vehicle sales amounted to RMB1,544.3 million, RMB19,671.2 million, and RMB33,911.8 million (US$4,776.4 million) in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively, with a gross profit margin of 1.8%, 4.7%, and 15.0%, respectively.

Lotus Technology's total revenue amounted to RMB6,527.5 million, RMB31,899.4 million, and RMB51,672.6 million (US$7,277.9 million) in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively, with a gross profit margin of 15.9%, 7.7%, and 13.3%, respectively. Lotus Technology recorded a net loss of RMB4,514.3 million, RMB7,655.1 million, and RMB8,264.2 million (US$1,164.0 million) in 2021, 2022, and 2023, respectively. Lotus Technology is a fast-growing battery electric vehicle (BEV) technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation and technological advancement in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by its strong in-house research and development capabilities, high operational flexibility, and flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, and a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. • ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In November 2023, Lotus Technology launched its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. Powered by 800V architecture and multi-link suspension structure, Lotus Technology's upscale sedan model is expected to achieve a $2.84 s 0-100 km/h acceleration and a $688 km maximum CLTC range. Lotus Technology began the delivery of its first upscale sedan model in January 2024. As a testament to the popularity of Lotus Technology's current vehicle models and its capabilities, Lotus Technology has achieved a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months after the initial delivery, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle (NEV) models. premium BEV models in China. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China. This is among the fastest delivery growth in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving the electrification and innovation of the automotive industry through the development of premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions. Since its inception, ZEEKR has focused on advancing BEV architecture, hardware, software, and the integration of new technologies, supported by strong in-house research and development (R&D) capabilities and an efficient organizational structure. This approach enables rapid product development and effective market strategies, facilitating swift expansion despite its relatively short operating history.

The company has made notable progress with its innovative vehicle lineup, which includes the ZEEKR 001, the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, launched in April 2021, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, introduced in November 2022. The ZEEKR 001 has achieved significant sales milestones, including delivering over 10,000 units within four months of its launch and surpassing 10,000 monthly deliveries in October 2022. By the end of 2023, ZEEKR had delivered a total of 196,633 vehicles, primarily in China, positioning it as a rapidly growing player in the premium BEV market.

ZEEKR's development is underpinned by the SEA platform, an open-source modular architecture owned by Geely Holding, which allows for a diverse range of vehicle types and rapid integration of advanced technologies. The company benefits from Geely's extensive industry experience, innovative engineering, and strong supply chain management, which enhance product reliability and consumer interest.

In addition to its vehicle offerings, ZEEKR emphasizes a customer-centric approach, utilizing a direct-to-consumer sales model and a robust charging network to enhance the user experience. The company has formed strategic partnerships with leading firms like Mobileye and Waymo to advance autonomous driving technologies and expand its global reach.

The BEV market is poised for significant growth, particularly in China and Europe, with projections indicating a substantial increase in sales by 2028. ZEEKR is well-positioned to capitalize on these opportunities, focusing on next-generation mobility solutions that combine luxury, performance, and advanced technology.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: The European BEV market has significant size and growth potential, which is expected to reach 5.3 million units in sales volume in 2028, representing a CAGR of 18.6% from 2024 to 2028, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology has started to deliver ZEEKR 001 in Europe in December 2023. In the future, Lotus Technology also plans to tap into the robotaxi market in the United States.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has entered into Cooperation Framework Agreements with Geely Group for the manufacturing of the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR 009 at the ZEEKR Factory, the manufacturing of the ZEEKR X at the Chengdu Factory, and the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model at the Meishan Factory. Lotus Technology's future operation and prospects depend on the successful ramping and maintaining of operations in the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. See “Business — Manufacturing and Quality Control.” There can be no assurance that Lotus Technology's oversight on battery electric vehicle (BEV) manufacturing will always be effective, as the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory are not owned by Lotus Technology. Vehicle production at such factories may also experience delays or suspensions. For example, vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory was temporarily suspended in early 2022 due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and Lotus Technology also encountered a temporary suspension in production at the ZEEKR Factory in the first quarter of 2023 due to production line upgrades at the factory. As of the date of this prospectus, Lotus Technology has not experienced any material customer complaints caused by the delays or suspensions of vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. In addition, there will be a negative impact on Lotus Technology's business operation if, in the future, such original equipment manufacturer (OEM) model is limited by applicable laws and regulations, or becomes subject to more stringent regulatory oversight.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Any problems or delays in ramping and maintaining operations of the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory or the Meishan Factory could negatively affect the production of our BEVs. 
summary: The company has entered into Cooperation Framework Agreements with Geely Group for the production of its ZEEKR models, with specific models allocated to different factories: the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR 009 will be produced at the ZEEKR Factory, the ZEEKR X at the Chengdu Factory, and an upscale sedan at the Meishan Factory. The company's future success relies heavily on the effective ramp-up and operation of these facilities. However, the oversight of battery electric vehicle (BEV) manufacturing at these non-owned factories has faced challenges, including production delays and suspensions due to COVID-19 and necessary upgrades. While customer complaints have been minimal, potential future regulatory changes and the inherent complexities of BEV manufacturing could pose risks to the company's operations and financial health. Further information is available in the "Business — Manufacturing and Quality Control" section.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Given the size and complexity of the manufacturing of BEVs, it is possible that the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, or the Meishan Factory may experience issues or delays in further expanding their production output. If any of these factories experiences any such issues or delays, Lotus Technology's business, prospects, operating results, and financial condition could be adversely impacted.

Lotus Technology began the delivery of its first upscale sedan model in January 2024. Lotus Technology's current and future BEV models will define the company's success. Going forward, Lotus Technology plans to capture the extensive potential of the premium BEV market globally through an expanding portfolio of vehicles. For instance, Lotus Technology plans to launch vehicles for the next generation of mobility lifestyles. As a testament to the popularity of Lotus Technology's current products and capabilities, Lotus Technology has achieved a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months after the initial delivery, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end NEV models and premium BEV models in China. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China.

metadata.title_summary:
title: OVERVIEW 
summary: ZEEKR is an emerging leader in the battery electric vehicle (BEV) sector, dedicated to driving innovation and electrification within the automotive industry. The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

ZEEKR's growth trajectory has been impressive, with significant milestones such as delivering over 10,000 units of the ZEEKR 001 within four months of its launch and achieving a total of 196,633 vehicle deliveries by the end of 2023. The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology is a fast-growing BEV technology company. Through developing and offering next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, Lotus Technology aspires to lead the electrification, intelligentization, and innovation of the automobile industry. Since its inception, Lotus Technology has focused on innovation in BEV architecture, hardware, software, and application of new technologies. Lotus Technology's efforts are backed by strong in-house R&D capabilities, a deep understanding of products, high operational flexibility, and a flat, efficient organizational structure. Together, these features enable fast product development, launch, and iteration, as well as a series of customer-oriented products and go-to-market strategies. Thus, Lotus Technology is able to rapidly expand even with a limited operating history. Lotus Technology strategically spearheaded the premium intelligent BEV market with unique positioning, featuring a strong sense of technology, in-house R&D capabilities, stylish design, high-caliber performance, and a premium user experience. Lotus Technology's current product portfolio primarily includes ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, ZEEKR 009, ZEEKR X, and an upscale sedan model. • ZEEKR 001. With an unwavering commitment to its mission, Lotus Technology released ZEEKR 001 in April 2021, a five-seater, cross-over hatchback vehicle model with superior performance and functionality. Targeting the premium BEV market, ZEEKR 001 is Lotus Technology's first vehicle model and the world’s first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake, according to Frost & Sullivan. ZEEKR 001 is also the first mass-produced BEV model with over $1,000 km CLTC range, according to Frost & Sullivan. Lotus Technology began the delivery of ZEEKR 001 in October 2021.

Lotus Technology also holds a variety of offline customer events to nurture a vibrant ZEEKR user community. Lotus Technology's customer engagement efforts enable the company to better understand customer needs to be incorporated into future product design and continuously strengthen customer loyalty and stickiness. Underpinned by its superior capability in supply chain and manufacturing planning and management, Lotus Technology is also able to offer a wide range of customized options in terms of vehicle designs and functionalities, which are highly appreciated by its customers.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has established a comprehensive charging network and provided hassle-free charging services through at-home charging solutions, on-the-road charging solutions, and 24/7 charging fleets. The ultra charging stations, in particular, provide users with an ultimate charging experience through Lotus Technology's proprietary ultra-fast charging technology developed by Ningbo Viridi. As of December 31, 2023, there were 882 ZEEKR charging stations with different charging capabilities, including 436 ultra charging stations, 330 super charging stations, and 116 light charging stations, covering over 130 cities in China, further supported by over 54 thousand third-party charging stations that cover over 340 cities in China with approximately 610 thousand charging piles in total. Lotus Technology has established in-depth partnerships with a number of internationally renowned smart mobility companies, laying a solid foundation for Lotus Technology's business development and global expansion. For example, Lotus Technology collaborates with Mobileye, a subsidiary of Intel and one of Lotus Technology's strategic investors, for consumer-ready autonomous driving solutions. Going forward, Lotus Technology will continue to deepen its collaboration with Mobileye. Lotus Technology is working with Waymo, a leader in L4 autonomous driving technology, to supply vehicles for the Waymo One Fleet. The vehicles are purpose-built TaaS vehicles based on SEA-M, which is an advanced version of SEA and a high-tech mobility solution that supports a range of future mobility products including robotaxis and logistics vehicles. Furthermore, Lotus Technology has deep relationships with a range of leading suppliers, such as CATL, Bosch, and Aptiv.

The company benefits from its affiliation with Geely Group, which provides extensive industry expertise, innovative engineering, and a robust supply chain, enhancing ZEEKR's product reliability and market competitiveness.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: In November 2023, Lotus Technology launched its first upscale sedan model targeting tech-savvy adults and families. Powered by 800V architecture and multi-link suspension structure, Lotus Technology's upscale sedan model is expected to achieve a $2.84 s 0-100 km/h acceleration and a $688 km maximum CLTC range. Lotus Technology began the delivery of its first upscale sedan model in January 2024. As a testament to the popularity of Lotus Technology's current vehicle models and its capabilities, Lotus Technology has achieved a total delivery of 10,000 units of ZEEKR 001 in less than four months after the initial delivery, which, according to Frost & Sullivan, is one of the fastest among the major mid- to high-end new energy vehicle models. premium BEV models in China. In October 2022, Lotus Technology delivered 10,119 units of ZEEKR 001 to the market, making it the first pure-electric premium vehicle model manufactured by a Chinese BEV brand with over 10,000 units of single-month delivery volume, according to Frost & Sullivan. As of December 31, 2023, Lotus Technology delivered a total of 196,633 ZEEKR vehicles since the first vehicle delivery in October 2021, including 192,441 delivered in China. This is among the fastest delivery growth in the premium BEV market in China, according to Frost & Sullivan.

title: OVERVIEW

The company focuses on developing next-generation premium BEVs and technology-driven solutions, leveraging strong in-house research and development capabilities and a flexible organizational structure to rapidly create and launch customer-oriented products. 

Since its inception, ZEEKR has introduced several groundbreaking models, including the ZEEKR 001, recognized as the world's first mass-produced pure electric shooting brake with a range exceeding 1,000 km, and the luxury ZEEKR 009 MPV, which offers an ultra-luxury experience. The lineup also features the compact ZEEKR X SUV and a newly launched upscale sedan model, all designed to cater to diverse consumer needs while emphasizing stylish design, high performance, and exceptional user experiences.

The company is also committed to advancing its technological capabilities, focusing on electrification and intelligent mobility. This includes the development of its proprietary E/E architecture and ZEEKR OS, which facilitate over-the-air updates and the integration of cutting-edge autonomous driving technologies. 

As the global BEV market is poised for substantial growth, particularly in China and Europe, ZEEKR aims to capitalize on this potential by expanding its vehicle portfolio and enhancing its customer engagement through a direct-to-consumer sales model. The company has established a comprehensive charging network and formed strategic partnerships to bolster its business development and global reach, positioning itself for continued success in the rapidly evolving electric vehicle landscape.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: As a premium BEV brand incubated by Geely Group, Lotus Technology inherits unique competitive edges from Geely Group that are developed through years of execution experience at the frontier of the industry, such as innovative and agile engineering capabilities, robust R&D capabilities, deep industry expertise, extreme attention to safety, top-notch professionals, strong supply chain and manufacturing management capabilities, and operational know-how. Geely Group’s powerful and world-class brand equity also echoes product innovation, performance, and reliability in its broad customer base, which, in turn, contributes to the significant consumer interest and demand for the ZEEKR brand. These competitive advantages enable Lotus Technology to quickly incorporate customer needs and concepts into its products and manage the complex operation process to achieve the fast ramp-up of production and deliveries. Lotus Technology also leverages Geely Group’s advanced and well-established manufacturing capacity, which helps retain effective oversight over key steps in procurement, manufacturing, and product quality control with minimal capital outlay. At the same time, Lotus Technology's BEVs are manufactured at the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory, which are owned and operated by Geely Group, and Geely Holding was Lotus Technology's largest supplier for 2022 and 2023. Furthermore, before the launch of ZEEKR 001, a significant portion of Lotus Technology's revenue has historically been derived from sales of batteries and other components and research and development services to Geely Group. Lotus Technology has strong in-house technological capabilities focusing on electrification and intelligentization.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has in the past entered into a series of cooperation framework agreements in relation to battery electric vehicle (BEV) development and manufacturing with Geely Group. The cooperation framework agreements relate to either the manufacturing of the Zeekr 001, Zeekr 001 FR, and Zeekr 009 at the Zeekr Factory (the “Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements”), the manufacturing of the Zeekr X at the Chengdu Factory (the “Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model and Zeekr 7X at the Meishan Factory (the “Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement”), as well as the manufacturing of the Zeekr Mix and vehicles for Waymo at the Chunxiao Factory (the “Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement,” and together with the Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreements and the Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement, the “Cooperation Framework Agreements”). The currently effective Zeekr Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in August 2022. The currently effective Chengdu Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in February 2023. The currently effective Meishan Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in January 2024. The currently effective Chunxiao Factory Cooperation Framework Agreement was entered into in May 2024. Lotus Technology purchases vehicles from Geely Group at a price made up of the purchase cost of direct materials and a preagreed markup. Lotus Technology provides a standard product warranty to the vehicle purchasers. Under the Cooperation Framework Agreements, in the event where product quality issues are due to product manufacturing, Lotus Technology is entitled to seek damages from the factories, as applicable.

metadata.title_summary:
title: Cooperation Framework Agreements 
summary: The company has formed several cooperation framework agreements with Geely Group to develop and manufacture battery electric vehicles (BEVs) across various factories. These agreements include the production of models such as the Zeekr 001, Zeekr 009, and Zeekr X at designated factories, with specific agreements signed between August 2022 and May 2024. The company purchases vehicles from Geely at a price based on direct material costs plus a markup, and it provides a standard warranty to buyers. The agreements also include provisions for addressing product quality issues, allowing the company to claim damages from factories for manufacturing defects or raw material supplier issues. Additionally, they establish a mechanism for reserved annual production capacity, with compensation arrangements for any discrepancies between actual and reserved production levels. The agreements have varying expiration dates, with some set to expire in 2025 and 2027, while others do not have specified terms. Early termination can occur under certain conditions, such as insolvency or failure to meet obligations.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: According to the Frost & Sullivan Report, major players in the China premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) market include pureplay BEV companies and traditional original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) that also produce BEVs. The competition among premium BEV manufacturers concentrates on key factors such as product features, price, product quality and reliability, as well as design, brand awareness, and user experience. Leveraging the recognized product quality and in-depth focus on technology upgrading and efficient supply chain management, the ZEEKR 001 has become the best-selling premium battery electric vehicle (BEV) model in China in terms of sales volume, with 75,928 units delivered in 2023. During the same period, the ZEEKR 009 was also among the top ten premium BEV models in China with a sales volume of 19,527 units. Among the top 10 best-selling premium BEV models, the ZEEKR 001 and ZEEKR 009 have been widely recognized by customers in a very short time, which demonstrates their superior brand power and product performance.

metadata.title_summary:
title: COMPETITIVE LANDSCAPE 
summary: The Frost & Sullivan Report provides an in-depth analysis of the competitive landscape within China's premium Battery Electric Vehicle (BEV) market, where both dedicated BEV manufacturers and traditional original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) vie for market share. Key competitive factors include product features, pricing, quality, design, brand recognition, and user experience. The ZEEKR 001 has emerged as the top-selling premium BEV in China for 2023, with sales reaching 75,928 units, attributed to its high quality, advanced technology, and effective supply chain management. The ZEEKR 009 also made a significant mark, ranking among the top ten models with 19,527 units sold, showcasing ZEEKR's strong brand presence and consumer appeal.

The report features a table listing the top ten best-selling premium BEV models, highlighting the ZEEKR 001's launch in April 2021 at a starting price of 300,000 RMB, followed closely by the NIO ET5 and BMW i3. Other notable models include the BMW iX3, ZEEKR 009, and several NIO models, each contributing to the competitive dynamics of the market. The ZEEKR 001's rapid delivery time of under four months to reach 10,000 units sets it apart, alongside the NIO ET5, while other models like the BMW iX3 took significantly longer.

In terms of specifications, the ZEEKR 001 excels with impressive performance metrics, including a 100 kWh battery, a 705 km range, and advanced features like voice recognition and pilot assist. The ZEEKR 009 is recognized for its spacious interior and advanced safety features, making it a popular choice among consumers seeking multi-person travel options. The report also notes the rising demand for electric MPVs, with the ZEEKR 009 leading sales in this segment.

Additionally, the ZEEKR X, launched in April 2023, has quickly gained traction in the electric SUV market, ranking among the top ten best-selling models from July to December 2023. The Tesla Model Y remains the top-selling electric SUV, followed by other models like the XPENG G6 and Leapmotor C11. Overall, the report underscores ZEEKR's strong market performance and innovative strategies, positioning it as a formidable player in the evolving BEV landscape in China.

Key competitive factors include product features, pricing, quality, design, brand recognition, and user experience.

The ZEEKR 001, launched in October 2021, achieved a remarkable milestone by delivering 10,000 units in just four months, making it one of the fastest in the mid- to high-end BEV market. It stands out for its exceptional performance, advanced features like voice recognition, and pilot assist capabilities. The report also includes a comparative analysis of various premium BEV models, emphasizing ZEEKR 001's competitive pricing and specifications, including a 100 kWh battery and a range of 705 km.

In the electric Multi-Purpose Vehicle (MPV) segment, the ZEEKR 009 led sales in 2023 with 19,527 units sold, followed by models from BESTUNE, BYD, Denza, and VOYAH, reflecting a growing consumer preference for technologically advanced and spacious vehicles. 

Additionally, the ZEEKR X, an electric compact SUV launched in April 2023, quickly gained traction, ranking among the top ten best-selling electric SUVs priced between RMB 150,000 and RMB 300,000. It achieved notable sales of 19,622 units, underscoring its competitive position in the market.

all_retrieved_content.page_content: Lotus Technology has entered into Cooperation Framework Agreements with Geely Group for the manufacturing of the ZEEKR 001, ZEEKR 001 FR, and ZEEKR 009 at the ZEEKR Factory, the manufacturing of the ZEEKR X at the Chengdu Factory, and the manufacturing of the upscale sedan model at the Meishan Factory. Lotus Technology's future operation and prospects depend on the successful ramping and maintaining of operations in the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. See “Business — Manufacturing and Quality Control.” There can be no assurance that Lotus Technology's oversight on battery electric vehicle (BEV) manufacturing will always be effective, as the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory are not owned by Lotus Technology. Vehicle production at such factories may also experience delays or suspensions. For example, vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory was temporarily suspended in early 2022 due to the COVID-19 pandemic, and Lotus Technology also encountered a temporary suspension in production at the ZEEKR Factory in the first quarter of 2023 due to production line upgrades at the factory. As of the date of this prospectus, Lotus Technology has not experienced any material customer complaints caused by the delays or suspensions of vehicle production at the ZEEKR Factory, the Chengdu Factory, and the Meishan Factory. In addition, there will be a negative impact on Lotus Technology's business operations if, in the future, such original equipment manufacturer (OEM) model is limited by applicable laws and regulations, or becomes subject to more stringent regulatory oversight.
